calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-16-2024 Continued To Jul-23-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Dismiss, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Jun-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Yunhua Gu, Plaintiff and Self-Represented Litigant, appeared in person and was assisted in English/Mandarin translation by Court-Certified Mandarin Interpreter Aidong Ni, #301135, with an oath on file:
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT COUNTY OF LAKE'S Motion To Dismiss.

The matter was not contested. The Court provides the tentative ruling to Mr. Gu in open court. Brief discussions are held.

At the conclusion of discussions, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Defendant's unopposed "motion to dismiss" is granted with prejudice.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Malone. Matter not reported. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Continued To Jun-11-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Feb-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT COUNTY OF LAKE's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed motion for change of venue to Lake County is granted; plaintiff shall pay transfer costs.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
